description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a rectangular plot of green land, featuring a long driveway leading up to the main entrance. The structure has a simple, elongated rectangular footprint with a gable roof, and the roof is dark gray in color. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely painted or finished in a pale material, and there are several windows distributed along the front and sides. The driveway is a prominent feature, extending from the street to the house, and there is a small step or porch area at the entrance. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with the front facade having a central door flanked by windows. The overall design is functional and modest, typical of suburban or rural bungalows.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a dark gable roof, set on a green plot with a long driveway and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central door, and flanking windows, with the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the driveway and the side profile of the bungalow, with visible windows and roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, fewer windows, and the continuation of the green plot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the end of the driveway, side entrance, and additional windows.
